name: NocoDB
description: Read, update, write and delete data from NocoDB

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your NocoDB server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Workspace Name or ID
fields.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

fields.label: Base Name or ID
fields.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

fields.label: Table Name or ID
fields.description: The table to operate on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Data to Send
fields.description: Whether to insert the input data this node receives in the new row

fields.label: Inputs to Ignore
fields.description: List of input properties to avoid sending, separated by commas. Leave empty to send all properties.

fields.label: Fields to Send
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: fieldValues, fieldValues.fieldName, fieldValues.binaryData, fieldValues.fieldValue, fieldValues.binaryProperty)

fields.description: Host of your NocoDB server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Workspace Name or ID
fields.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

fields.label: Table Name or ID

fields.label: Row ID Value
fields.description: The value of the ID field

fields.label: Download Attachments
fields.description: Whether the attachment fields define in 'Download Fields' will be downloaded

fields.label: Download Fields
fields.description: Name of the fields of type 'attachment' that should be downloaded. Multiple ones can be defined separated by comma. Case sensitive.

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Download Attachments
fields.description: Whether the attachment fields define in 'Download Fields' will be downloaded

fields.label: Download Fields
fields.description: Name of the fields of type 'attachment' that should be downloaded. Multiple ones can be defined separated by comma. Case sensitive.

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: viewId, fields, sort, where)
